programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 273

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 305
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 271
programme.desc: High Strength Activated Ginkgo to Boost Your Mind and Circulation 125mg of Activated Ginkgo Biloba enhanced with Japanese Activated Technology for better absorption. programme.title: We Are Big Eaters - All Over Taiwan S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hosted by Chung Hsin-yu, "We Are Big Eaters" bring viewers to popular street food stalls and eateries to recommend good food to the viewers and simultaneously competing for the "Big Eaters" novelty.

programme.title: The Glorious Pediatricians S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: The documentary captures the daily work of pediatricians and healthcare staff in major departments of Shenzhen Children's Hospital, including emergency pediatrics, cardiothoracic surgery, intensive care, neurosurgery, urology, orthopedics, endocrinology, and hematology oncology. It focuses on the common interactions between ordinary people and hospitals, using the life and work of pediatricians as a microcosm.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 48
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 16
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Xiao Ping's negligence led to the loss of the restored photo. Bi De pretends to be Bi An and attends the selection test for the overseas scholarship. Bi De bids farewell to Wan Er.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Youli goes to great lengths to capture Nanxiu and Zhihui's interactions for Sulin, but Sulin shows no interest, saying she has already moved on from Nanxiu.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 22
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhang Xianjing visits the hospital for treatment after injuring her hand. Jianyu immediately recognises her as the professor he once had a crush on. The unexpected reunion pleasantly surprises them both.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Tale of the Nine-tailed - EP 4
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhiya’s investigation leads her into a bizarre case involving a supernatural being tied to the Dragon King legend.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 87
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 4

programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 26
programme.desc: Li Li finally makes peace with a long-standing regret and discovers that happiness does not always come from following the path others expect. Inspired by her courage, Ji Xing begins reflecting on whether she should be equally honest about her own feelings.

programme.title: Time Concert 2024 - EP 3
programme.desc: After 20 years, the Girls are back on stage! "Time Concert 2024" revives nostalgic melodies, celebrating two decades of music with a dazzling showcase and a competition for the top hits of the era!

programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.desc: Ching-lam's relentless pursuit of answers strains his relationships with those closest to him. As Kong Ka-ching worries he is losing himself to obsession, Ying-fung encourages him to focus on the future rather than the past.

programme.title: Neng Pete Bau Cintanya Warbiyasah
programme.desc: Dania (Shanice Margaretha) sells petai chili sauce on campus. One day, she accidentally meets Kenny (Aliando Syarief), a rich kid. Kenny's father holds an important position on campus. However, Dania is upset by Kenny's actions, which resulted in him bumping into her and scattering his wares. Kenny doesn't accept this, and they get into an argument.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 31
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.desc: Julian (Arya Vasco) is determined to find the whereabouts of Vino's mother and sibling, his close friend. It turns out that Julian is reunited with Gea (Saskia Chadwick), the person whose bag he once stole, who turns out to be Vino's younger sibling, separated for more than a decade. In order to deliver Vino's last message, Julian disguises himself as Vino and enters the life of Gea and her family.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

Derry's father, who found out about this, was angry with Derry and forbade him from approaching Elsa again. He preferred if Derry was with Vina. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roasted corn.

programme.title: Ada Kalanya Cinta Melipir Dari Hati Duluan
programme.desc: Wulan (Jennifer Eve) helps a pickpocket escape from a mob, and strangely enough, Wulan even tricks the pickpocket several times by returning the stolen wallets to their owners. But suddenly Wulan decides to cosplay as Ninin, a beautiful girl who works in a widower's house. Strangely, there Ninin claims to be the widower's fiancée. With determination, Ninin persists, despite facing criticism from some people who have been close to the widower (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 9
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Kejar Cintamu Pake Cara Paling Badabest
programme.desc: Rayes (Masaji Wijayanto) loves nothing more than pulling ruthless pranks on freshmen during orientation week, and the feisty Savira (Sitha Marino) becomes his ultimate target. Just as Savira reaches her breaking point with his antics, a shocking rumor surfaces that their families have arranged their marriage. However, the stark contrast in their social status stands as a massive wall between them.

Just as Savira reaches her breaking point with his antics, a shocking rumor surfaces that their families have arranged their marriage. However, the stark contrast in their social status stands as a massive wall between them.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 35
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 181
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: AKU GANTI CITA - CITA BANGUN JEMBATAN KE HATIMU
programme.desc: Citra (Soraya Rasyid) unleashes her fury on Surya (Andrew Andika), blaming him for a collapsed village bridge that has been left neglected. To make matters worse, the broken infrastructure caused Citra to miss a crucial job interview in the city, sparking a bitter feud between the two

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 9
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Bodyguard Receh Cintanya Gak Weleh Weleh
programme.desc: Marsya (Indah Nicole), a wealthy and brilliant heiress, plots a fake kidnapping of herself with a friend to extort a massive ransom from her own mother. The scheme takes a dramatic turn when a brave stranger named Yuda (Indra Brotolaras) steps in and 'rescues' her. When Marsya’s mother uncovers the truth about the staged abduction, she hires Yuda as Marsya’s full-time bodyguard to keep her in line. Undeterred, the rebellious heiress immediately tries to lobby Yuda into joining her next fake kidn

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 35
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: AGAK LAIN MAS SUSU MURNI
programme.desc: Mail travels all the way to Jakarta on a desperate mission to locate his missing older brother. While the city feels vast and overwhelming, destiny works in mysterious ways when he unexpectedly crosses paths with Imah—his true soulmate—right at his new workplace.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 182
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ARJUNA CINTANYA GAK PERNAH BERCHANDYA
programme.desc: Ayu (Nabila Zavira) already has a boyfriend, but her father, who loves Javanese puppetry, doesn't like her boyfriend. Then, Ayu meets a handsome young man wearing an Anoman costume, but Ayu thinks he's playing a trick on her. It turns out that while she's undergoing training for a teacher promotion, Ayu meets the young man who loves Javanese art again, and their suitcases even get swapped.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 10

Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Jadian Sama Cewek Duren ACC Sayang
programme.desc: Ken (Cakrawala Airawan) harbors a severe phobia of durians; the mere smell of the fruit leaves him nauseous or completely unconscious. In a cruel twist of fate, he is forced to deal with Ulfa (Shanice Margaretha), the daughter of a wealthy durian plantation tycoon. Repelled by her family's trade, Ken vows to stay as far away from Ulfa as humanly possible.

programme.title: AKU TERPISANG PISANG PADA PANDANGAN PERTAMA
programme.desc: Thomas (Lucky Perdana) nearly gets into a terrible accident due to Nadya’s (Shanice Margaretha) reckless driving as she speeds down the road in a banana cargo truck. To his absolute horror, Thomas later discovers that Nadya is the primary banana supplier for his mother’s bakery business. Furious about the roadside encounter, Thomas demands his mother cut all professional ties with the dangerous driver

programme.title: Cinta Tak Perlu Dibagi Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Driven by a secret mission to reclaim her family's lost plantation from the powerful Pak Hendra, Rina (Jennifer Eve) infiltrates his wealthy household in Jakarta. Using her charm and polite demeanor, she successfully captures the hearts of Hendra's two sons, Damar (Royano Kevin) and Nando (Masaji Wijayanto). While a genuine romance sparks between Rina and Nando, a massive family rift explodes when Damar confesses his own feelings, leading to a catastrophic event that shatters Rina's relationship

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 34
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 15
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 13
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Serba Tahu - EP 6
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 18
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 25
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 21
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 6
programme.desc: Frust Gila rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 4
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 1
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 6
programme.desc: Cinta segi tiga remaja sekolah menengah yang rumit dengan masalah keluarga dan rahsia besar dari masa lalu.

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 9
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei, Siti Di Hati
programme.desc: Pok Ya masih tidak dapat melupakan Siti, isterinya yang telah lari. Untuk mengubati luka hatinya, Pok Ya bernikah dengan anak kawannya, tetapi isteri barunya tidak selembut Siti...

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 14
programme.desc: Sebuah program baru yang menggabungkan elemen drama, komedi dan program masakan dalam satu rancangan. Setiap episod akan menampilkan spoof dari drama terbaik Astro juga dari filem box office

programme.title: Kuali Terbalik - EP 9
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 25
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 11
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 9
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Gerak Geri GenZ - EP 4
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 4
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 5
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Spontan Boboi & Kengkawan - EP 9

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 9

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 1

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 4

programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 4
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 5

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 6

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 10

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 8

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 2

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 5

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.desc: Mikail terkejut apabila Ikmal cuba menyerang Datuk Mokhzani. Mikail cuba untuk menidakkan yang Ikmal adalah abang kandungnya. Datuk Mokhzani tidak pasti kenapa dia diserang.

programme.title: Sepenggal Puisi - EP 6

Release Year: 2024 Director: Anil Sharma Awards: 2025 WinnerTechnical Award- Best Story- Amjad Ali, Sunil Sirvaiya, Anil Sharma

programme.desc: A story of friendship and loss of innocence when two worlds clash amid a wedding when a secret exposes a betrayal, and innocent friends converge with dangerous criminals and intense violence. programme.desc: Shivam, a hitman, is asked to keep an eye on his boss's mistress. However, he soon learns that she has been a victim of sex trafficking and decides to unite her with her lover. Release Year: 2007 Director: Mohit Suri

programme.title: Gaami
programme.desc: Shankar isolates himself to cure a rare condition, but his journey forces him to confront buried fears and emotional wounds that hold the true key to his survival.

programme.title: Heyy Baby
programme.desc: Three men living in Australia are surprised to find a baby on their doorstep. They do not know who the father is and start a frantic search for the woman who could possibly be the mother.

programme.title: Bheemla Nayak
programme.desc: A battle begins between SI Bheemla Nayak, a righteous policeman, and Daniel Shekhar, an-ex havildar, when Daniel tricks Bheemla into surrendering to corruption.

programme.title: Piku
programme.desc: Critically acclaimed comedy about the relationship between a daughter (Deepika Padukone) and her aging father (Amitabh Bachchan), whose eccentricities drive everyone crazy.

programme.title: Malang
programme.desc: Advait visits Goa where he meets Sara, a free-spirited girl who lives life unshackled. Opposites attract and all goes well until life turns upside down

programme.title: Time To Dance
programme.desc: When a ballroom dancer's shot at a crucial tournament is jeopardized, a street dancer must face his own painful past and step up as her new partner.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Comedy Station - Producer Champaklal
programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other

programme.title: Koi Jaane Na
programme.desc: A heartbroken writer struggling with writer's block goes to a hill station where he finds love again but uncovers a copycat serial killer who has mysteriously come alive.

programme.title: Naram Garam
programme.desc: Two lovers, Ramprasad and Kusum, face various difficulties when many men, including Ramprasad's employer, express their desire to wed Kusum.

programme.title: Kya Bolti Tu?
programme.desc: A young woman breaks up with her boyfriend when she learns he does not believe in true love, but her next boyfriend is not a perfect match either.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Raj, Pooja and Jhanvi are in a complicated love triangle. Pooja and Jhanvi love Raj. Raj loves Jhanvi but is misunderstood as Pooja's husband by their family. How will the confusion clear off?

programme.title: Secret Superstar
programme.desc: Insia, an ambitious young girl, dreams of becoming a singer but faces opposition from her father. Undeterred, she strives to follow her passion by anonymously posting her songs on the Internet.

programme.title: Tera Kya Hoga Lovely
programme.desc: A comedy of errors that traverses through the hinterlands of Haryana unfolding crazy dynamics, relationships and eccentricities that occur between family, friends, lovers, and even cops!.

programme.title: Section 375
programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.title: Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Escaping from the police in Agra, Rani and Rishu decide to elope together. When their plan goes awry, Rani seeks a helping hand from a kind admirer.

programme.title: Shola Aur Shabnam

programme.title: Linlang

programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: DP World Tour 2026 Open d'Italia Day 1
programme.desc: The Italian Open is the men's national open golf championship of Italy. It was founded in 1925. The format of the Italian Open is a standard stroke play event played over 72 holes with a cut after 36 holes. The last Italian man to win his national championship is Francesco Molinari, who did so in 2006 and 2016, but he is the only local winner since 1980.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. programme.title: FS MMA Rafael Dias vs. Sami Aziz
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt and American Top Team product Rafael Dias faces off against Sami "Uzi" Aziz in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Paul Williams vs. Verno Phillips
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Junior Middleweights Paul "The Punisher" Williams (35-1, 26 KOs) and Verno Phillips (42-10, 21 KOs) as they battle for the vacant WBO Interim Belt at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California, USA, on November 29, 2008.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Marco Antonio Barrera vs. Agapito Sanchez
programme.desc: With the WBO Super Bantamweight World Championship on the line, titleholder Marco Antonio Barrera of Mexico takes on Dominican challenger Agapito Sanchez in front of a hot crowd at the Civic Center in South Padre Island, Texas. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected. Barrera would go on to a

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 4 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takayasu, Mitakeumi, Myogiryu and Meisei.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Akifumi Shimoda vs. Rico Ramos
programme.desc: This episode features a title bout between and Rico Ramos and WBA super bantamweight champion Akifumi Shimoda that ends with a highlight-reel KO, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected. Barrera would go on to a

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 4 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takayasu, Mitakeumi, Myogiryu and Meisei.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Akifumi Shimoda vs. Rico Ramos
programme.desc: This episode features a title bout between and Rico Ramos and WBA super bantamweight champion Akifumi Shimoda that ends with a highlight-reel KO, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds. Directed by H

programme.title: FS MMA Rafael Dias vs. Sami Aziz
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt and American Top Team product Rafael Dias faces off against Sami "Uzi" Aziz in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Baku and the #2 world ranked fighter, Michael Korrell, talks judo.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Freddy Hernandez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Andre Berto defend the WBC welterweight championship against Freddy Hernandez. With one quick, hard right hand to the face in the first round, this bout comes to a sudden halt. Berto looks to keep his undefeated streak alive and thrust himself into talks for bigger fights with the likes of stars such as Floyd Mayweather. Also on the card, Jean Pascal looks for an upset in the light heavyweight division.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 73
programme.desc: The Tubby Car takes the Teletubbies to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Slidey. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­Laa and Po have great fun sliding down again and again.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 7
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'strawberry', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We grow strawberries, pick them and enjoy eating yummy ones. There are skipping and space strawberries, and Dee even does the samba with one! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Messy loves balloons, whatever colour they are, but what is inside them to make them float up high into the sky?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 44
programme.desc: Bryan the ferry can't shut his engine off, so he's speeding out of control around the lake. How will Mojo and Bo get aboard to take control and steer Bryan to safety?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the rainforest, upsetting the local tree frogs.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 32
programme.desc: Andy heads to Central America in search of the manakin bird, so he can learn its amazing dance moves.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh! Luckily Duggee has his Breakfast Badge, and soon the Squirrels will too.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Squirrels have fun learning what opposites are, with a little bit of help from a lot of topsy-turvy animal friends!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels stumble upon some of Duggee's old radio equipment and decide to start their own show.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: After a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded at the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, with help from new teacher Professor Wave, must work fast to return them to the ocean deeps. But with Glitch's camouflaged submarine zooming around the nearby waters, the situation quickly becomes more complicated.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 14
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Mars tries to fill in for a missing Moon, but needs a little coaching from Sarah and Duck.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran visit the art gallery and join a tour with curator Marie to see lots of different types of art. JoJo realises art isn't just for looking at - it's for making too!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 63 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 125

programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: “Made In Taiwan” records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the “Made In Taiwan” theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: EMISSARY - EP 6
programme.desc: The invincible lawyer Pak-Yin believes his proficiency in legal knowledge enables him to have it all, including a loving life with his wife Po-Lam. His world collapses when infidelity occurs due to the differences between them.

programme.title: The Airport Diary II & What's On Today - EP 8
programme.desc: Set against the evolving Hong Kong International Airport, this sequel follows four key airport veterans as they enter new stages in their careers while taking on the responsibility of protecting and running the airport. Meanwhile, three younger recruits begin their own journeys.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2836
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Pilgrimage of History
programme.desc: Hosts Tony Hung and Priscilla Wong use real-life on-site visits combined with AI technology to recreate virtual appearances, leading viewers on a lighthearted journey through history, connecting the ancient and the modern, and launching a new historical travel adventure!

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 29
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies
programme.desc: This show brings on doctors and Chinese medicine practitioners to discuss diseases that the elderly should pay attention to, and provide prevention and treatment methods.

programme.desc: Fang Ri Jin (Carlos Chan) unexpectedly connects with Xing Ke Lan (Hera Chan), who is in a future timeline and trapped in a crisis. Is fate already predetermined? Will Ri Jin choose to compromise, or will he take a leap of faith to rewrite destiny?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 901-950) VVD Mandarin - EP 914
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational valu

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 20
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 16
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Communion - EP 4
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 9
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 39
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 1
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Communion - EP 6
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 11
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 4
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 5
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud's successor as the city's guard.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll's eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Cherie
programme.desc: Cherie Chung plays the title character in this sexy romance as a fitness instructor who attracts the attentions of a wealthy businessman and a handsome photographer.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: An illegitimate daughter of a businessman gets three wishes from a genie, Bo. However, Bo's magical power is far from perfect, leading to much hilarity in this charming fantasy comedy.

programme.title: Casino Tycoon
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of Macau's Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city's casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence.

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: A young man Lung leaves his rural home on a small island to seek fortune in Hong Kong. His uncle cons Lung to play in a snooker tournament using his father's land as the bet. Lung lost the match but luckily, his childhood friend Momo encourages him to compete again using her land as the bet. Can he finally win his land back?

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey1-Pandora's box
programme.desc: Joker, a carefree bandit leader, learns he is the reincarnation of the Monkey King. As demons and immortals close in, he is drawn into a chaotic, time-bending journey with the mystical Pandora's Box. Caught between past and present, he must choose between destiny and freedom.

programme.title: Royal Tramp II
programme.desc: The leader of Dragon clan, Long Er, helps General Wu to overthrow Emperor Kang Xi. However, Long Er is betrayed by General Wu and is rescued by Xiao Bao. As a result, she bestows her virginity and martial arts power to Xiao Bao to fight against Wu. At the same time, Xiao Bao fortuitously unveils the hidden treasures from "The Sutra of 42 Chapters".

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Lawyer Yip defends a rapist and gets him acquitted. Yip's boyfriend Fong, a police inspector, knows he is guilty and despises Yip for not upholding justice. The victim's sister takes revenge by spiking the rapist's drink but is raped instead. This puts the rapist back in court. Will Yip choose to uphold law or justice this time?

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi will inherit his dying grandfather's fortune with one condition - he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert. Chi falls in love with Siu Siu, but Robert intends to stop them by sending Moraine to seduce Chi. When Moraine decides to marry Chi for money, Robert stops her and reveals their plot.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: A bad-tempered, womanizing cop who always neglects his wife is shot in the head as he hunts down a drug dealer. Though he miraculously survives, he must depend on his wife to nurse him back to health. During the recovery, he begins to re-evaluate his life and repair the damages of his broken marriage.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Comparing to the director's previous Hex. This time, however, the stakes are even higher and the gruesome goings-on even more memorable. It all starts when a noble police detective starts investigating a child killer's claims of an evil spell, then it doesn't let up until the final, bloated, maggot-ridden cadaver falls.

programme.title: Mahjong Heroes
programme.desc: A hero helps a young student deflect a cunning and malicious gambling tycoon who is out to take over the student's family business over a game of mahjong.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua's hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Hong Kong Playboys
programme.desc: Sheng is a rich playboy who lives a carefree and fun life with the ladies, until his mother decides that he should get married. Up against other lady killers in his quest to find Miss Right, Sheng must decide what he wants.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Former world champion boxer Fai meets fiery young fighter Qi in Macau. As he mentors Qi for an upcoming MMA tournament, Fai rekindles his passion for fighting, life, and the people he cares about.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Turns We Take
programme.desc: A spicy hot pot restaurant in Northeast China serves different types of customers every day. Amongst them are a sweet young couple, two wayward young men and a taxi driver. Despite being complete strangers to each other, their lives are intertwined by a traffic accident...

programme.title: How to Choose a Royal Bride
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager has arranged for a Minister's daughter Qiong Yao, to become Emperor Kangxi's concubine. However, Qiong Yao escapes in pursuit of freedom in marriage and Kangxi is happy to not go through with the union. When Kangxi travels incognito to Jiangnan, he serendipitously encounters Qiong Yao, who disguises herself as a man...

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: The legendary swordsman Li, entrusts the Green Destiny sword to a noble house for safekeeping. It is swiftly stolen by Yu, a young aristocrat of immense martial skills trained by an unscrupulous outlaw master. Recognising her talent, Li tries to guide her towards righteousness but ultimately leads them both to a tragic fate.

programme.title: Fight Back to School II
programme.desc: Following his demotion, officer Sing resigns from the police force and goes undercover at an international school to privately investigate a terrorist plot. There, he discovers bumbling detective Tat posing as a teacher. Forced into an alliance, they team up to confront the heavily armed criminals behind the plot in a chaotic showdown.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: This is based on the real-life story of Master Yu Jim Yuen who strives to run his academy in the 1960s, even as the opera culture is declining. Three young men, Sammo Hung, Jackie Chan and Yuen Biao, are determined to train under Master Yu and undergo extremely tough training before they become three of Hong Kong's biggest stars

programme.title: How to Pick Girls Up !
programme.desc: Xin, a helpless loser in love, calls in to a radio show hosted by DJ Tsang to ask desperately for help. A self-proclaimed love expert, Tsang takes it upon himself to make sure Xin meets girls and leads him on a series of absurd excursions into the wild and dangerous world of modern love.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing and his brother arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Befriending a powerful mobster Tam, Ma is given his nightclub when he saves Tam's life. Ma's fortune rises but he must overcome the corruption and violence to survive.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Teenage heart-throbs Ching Li and Paul Chin Pei come across like Annette Funicello and Frankie Avalon in the musical Sunset, a musical romp that plays similar to one of Hollywood's famous "Beach Party" movies. A car load of girls meets a car load of boys, and Ching and Paul ultimately fall in love. Yet the film takes an acrid twist and turns out to be more like a Shakespearian tragedy than a beach-babe party.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: A master jewel thief turns over a new leaf as a professional singer in a nightclub. However, a series of robberies happened shortly after and he becomes the suspect again. The thief then sets up a trap to snare the copycat but will this backfire on him?

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: A tragic tale about a young girl who gets married and has five kids. When she and her husband die, leaving all five kids behind to fend for themselves, the eldest child is forced to be sold into prostitution to feed the other four.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Fan is cheated by her lover Tong to steal her master's Jade Dragon Sword. She is jailed in the Dragon Swamp as punishment and gave birth to a pair of twins - her daughter is raised by her master, while her son is taken by Tong. Twenty years later, the sword is stolen again and Fan's daughter goes seeking for it, meeting Fan's friend along the way.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: It's a fun and wild romp that mixes pleasure with pleasure. A nightclub owner, playboy Peter Chen Ho, has his ways with three sisters while gallivanting across Asia. Each one has a dangling relationship to save - ensuring a series of mishaps and comic moments.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: This is a coming-of-age tale depicting the lower class Hong Kong troubled youths in the 1960s and the societal issues that they face. Wang Chung is a hotheaded and rebellious teen who is tempted by the dark side, and have to unfortunately pay a huge price for it.

programme.title: To Kill a Mastermind
programme.desc: A ruthless crime syndicate, Qi Sha clan, which is controlled by seven chiefs is terrorizing China. The Imperial Court orders Minister Yang to bring them down by sending undercovers to the clan and disintegrating them from the inside. As more internal conflicts occur, will the masterminds of the clan find out who are the spys?

programme.title: The Comedy of Mismatches
programme.desc: Two pairs of lovers got mismatched accidentally. The man disguises as a woman for his sister's wedding ceremony, while his lover disguises as a man to marry another woman. After the marriage mismatches are revealed, the lovers and their families are taken to court, where Prefecture Chief Qiao manages to work out a happy ending.

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: Big Times for the Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Ah Niu finds a bag of jewels on the street and becomes rich. It is at this time that Uncle Zhou asks him to sign a contract to marry a girl, but it turns out to be a trap for Ah Niu to sell his house. In the end, Ah Niu becomes poor again…

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: A titular gang of misfits come together to protect a patriotic general from a scheming usurper. To this end, the unlikely heroes act as the general's escorts on a dangerous journey to a distant British consulate, beset by enemies and sinister Japanese interference along the way.

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A master gambler and his partner are recruited to investigate a Shanghai tycoon suspected of using his casino as a front for espionage. As they enter the high-stakes gambling world, they must outwit a dangerous opponent in a deadly game of skill and deception.

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: Let's Fall In Love
programme.desc: Da Yung, the son of a rich entrepreneur, meets Lian Lian, the niece of a kindergarten principal by chance. They fall into a misunderstanding on the first meeting, causing Da Yung to lose his wallet. Further misunderstanding occurs when he tries to get her to act as his fiancé so as to drive away two women whom he does not like…

programme.title: Mad Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Master Chen was an esteemed Monkey Kung Fu master, until he is framed and crippled by a ruthless villain and ends up becoming a wandering artiste. When Chen meets a young man, Little Monkey, on the streets, he decides to teach him all his monkey kung fu moves. Both men eventually team up to avenge Chen's past insult.

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: A long-awaited horror sequel after Enchanted Shadow, this is about three asylum inmates telling their stories. In story one, a husband and wife discover they should be careful what they wish for. A naked female ghost seeks revenge from her watery grave in story two, and a dead prostitute returns as a ghost in the last tale.

programme.title: Guess Who Killed My Twelve Lovers?
programme.desc: Jenny Hu, Shaw Brothers' gorgeous Chinese-German star, was given her first comedy role in the wild and wacky Guess Who Killed My Twelve Lovers? Described as "a comedy of belly laughs and chilling murders", it is a unique entry in the Hong Kong theater of the absurd.

programme.title: Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: The Killer star Danny Lee plays the lead role of a guy who needs to become a hero. He lies, steals and cheats his way into operating a plush casino, but when he incurs the wrath of a female Japanese gang leader, all bets are off!

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: All neighbours gather to gossip in flat number 8 on the second floor of the Gossip Street apartment building! Most of the residents are common people from all walks of life and there is never a lack of laughter or sarcasm in the neighbourhood. However, when a local mobster wants to change the place into a gambling den, things get serious...

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: A corrupt official attempts to steal a priceless Buddha statue from a temple to please a group of Westerners. Luckily, Doctor Zhang and his son manage to defeat the Western boxers, the Japanese Kendo opponents and the Western longsword fighters with Chinese kung fu, thus saving the Buddha statue.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: Hong Kong rhapsody is a musical extravaganza full of song and dance! Peter Chen-Ho stars as a playboy magician who changes his ways after he becomes the guardian of a young singer (Li Ching), the daughter of a deceased magician friend.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: After a royal coup, two princes are separated, one raised in Shaolin as Dao Xing, the other as Wu Zi Tai under a minister. Years later, they meet at Shaolin while seeking the Yi Jin Jing, unaware they are brothers, as hidden identities and destiny unfold amid rising conflict and danger.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: It is love beyond the grave, as a young scholar and his beautiful lover are torn apart forever by his dastardly uncle and his friend, who drive the girl to commit suicide... but with death comes revenge for the enchanting ghost. A spooky yet heart-wrenching tale...

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: An ambitious evil clan intends to rule the martial arts world. To achieve their goal, they must first steal a secret martial arts manuscript depicting how firearms can be produced. However, a supremely intelligent swordsman Shen Sheng Yi is protecting the manuscript and remains one step ahead of the evil clan.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: When the husband of a doctor, Tung is fatally wounded in an accident, he reveals to her about his affair with Blackie, who is impregnated with his baby. Despite the devastation of the betrayal and the eventual death of her husband, Tung is pressured by her mother-in-law into putting up with Blackie and offer $1M for her baby...

programme.title: That Man In Chang-an
programme.desc: The Han Emperor dies and his Empress Lu seizes the ruling power. She plots to kill the heir to the throne, Liu Heng, but the masked warrior discovers her plot and tips off Liu. Liu sends his princess to Chang An to ask for help. The masked warrior protects the princess from attackers along the way and supports Liu to become the new Emperor.

programme.title: Diau Charn
programme.desc: In the Han Dynasty, the tyrannical Prime Minister Dong Zuo takes control of the country, so Minister Wang plots to take him down using Diau Charn's beauty. Wang arranges for her to be Dong's concubine as he knows Dong's adopted son Lu Bu is in love with her, turning them against each other. Lu Bu ends up killing Dong Zuo to be with Diau Charn.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.title: TVBS News
programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: News Frontline
programme.desc: This program covers major global and local news events each day.

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money!_x000D_Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Actors On The Tour
programme.desc: The reality variety show "Actors On The Tour," guided by hosts Allison Lin and Fandy Fan , will invite an actor to travel alongside them. Through the guest's travel itinerary, the program aims to delve into the diverse charm of travel, challenging familiar perspectives and relishing the joy of entirely new travel experiences.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 18
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 3

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 26
programme.desc: Li Li finally makes peace with a long-standing regret and discovers that happiness does not always come from following the path others expect. Inspired by her courage, Ji Xing begins reflecting on whether she should be equally honest about her own feelings.
